name: Sok Marketler Ticaret A.S.
summary: Sok Marketler Ticaret A.S. operates in retail sector in Turkey. It sells fast-moving consuming products, such as dairy products, pasta, flour, semolina, ground rice and starch products, cleaning products, peanuts, hair dye products, and baby products; make-up products comprise lipsticks, blushers, mascaras, and beauty balms; chocolate products, including Madlen chocolates, biscuits, and chocolate-coated wafers; and cooking ingredients, deli, fruits and vegetables, kitchenware, cleaners, paper products, and clothing. The company operates approximately 8,145 stores in 81 provinces of Turkey. Sok Marketler Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1995 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
